title: Music Collection - JS&B [Textures]
description: Necessary addition to the Music Collection Datapack, textures and resources, design music fragment + disc mold... +15 Custom discs designs! + New Achievements..
body:
# **Textures & Resources:** [Music Collection - Just Shapes & Beats ](https://modrinth.com/project/musiccollection_jsab)

The **Data Pack + [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/music-collection-jsb-textures)** combination that adds... **+11 custom discs** to the game, along with a **New Structure** , **New Craftables** and **more...🥏**


![Banner 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce7d456d8e737c4823aad27301cfbcee283bac9c_0.webp)
> **LuisterCorp © - 2025**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Music Collection** modifies textures already **existing in the game.🎨**
- **Music Collection** textures are not compatible with other Resource Packs for **external disk modification.📉**
- **Support for 1.21+📿.**
- **Music Collection** textures has customized designs for your **discs, molds and musical fragment.**
- **Use Headphones** for a **better experience.🎧**


## Diseño de Discos y Canción elegida✒️ (Disc Design and Song of choice)

Each disc was handcrafted by choosing colors that match **Just Shapes & Beats🎨**
